backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining an esports backend with in-memory maps for announcements and roster members, exposing CRUD query/update methods for both collections with timestamp-based sorting for announcements.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping image asset replacement and frontend component audit requirements (profile avatar, PWA icons at 192×512px) to their associated components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, describing each component's purpose, styling approach, and notable implementation details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the shadcn-ui component system.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Legend X Esports PWA, including manifest link, service worker registration script, and apple-touch-icon references pointing to generated PWA icon assets.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA web app manifest for Legend X Esports specifying app name, theme colors, standalone display mode, and two icon sizes (192×192 and 512×512) from the generated assets folder.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker implementing a stale-while-revalidate caching strategy for same-origin GET requests, with cache versioning, old cache cleanup on activate, and an offline fallback to index.html for navigation requests.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders the PWAInstallBanner, Navbar, and LandingPage in a full-height dark-themed wrapper.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component displaying team mission text, a clipped profile image panel using the gaming artwork asset, and a four-card values grid with icons for Discipline, Excellence, Victory, and Brotherhood.
frontend/src/components/AnnouncementCard: Presentational card component for a single announcement that formats a nanosecond ICP timestamp, displays title and body excerpt, and reveals a 'Read More' indicator on hover.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand logo, social media links (X, Discord, Twitch, YouTube, Instagram), quick navigation links, and a contact section with a copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section displaying the Legend X Esports branding, tagline, CTA buttons linking to roster and about sections, and key stats (players, tournaments, founding year).
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with logo, desktop nav links, a 'Visit Website' external link button, and a responsive mobile menu toggle with slide-down drawer.
frontend/src/components/NewsSection.tsx: Displays a grid of announcement cards fetched via the useAnnouncements hook, with loading skeletons, error, and empty states handled.
frontend/src/components/PlayerCard.tsx: Displays a single player's avatar, name, and role in a styled card with hover effects, falling back to a default avatar image on error.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallBanner: A fixed top banner that prompts users to install the app as a PWA, handling the beforeinstallprompt event for Android and providing manual instructions for iOS Safari.
frontend/src/components/RosterSection.ts: Renders the team roster section with loading skeletons, error, and empty states, displaying player cards in a responsive grid fetched via the useRoster hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating announcements and roster members against the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind layers, defining CSS custom properties for the dark esports theme and utility classes for glows, typography, and clip-path effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Composes the full landing page by assembling Hero, About, Roster, News, and Footer sections in order.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with esports-specific color tokens, custom fonts, box shadows, keyframe animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the Legend X Esports app project, including version, existing features, known issues, image requirements, and architectural notes across 35 iterations.
